mapper.insert: INSERT INTO brokerage_order ( proposal_id, application_id, room_id, payer_uid, amount_fen, pay_method, status, proof_url, proof_note, paid_at, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{proposalId}, #{applicationId}, #{roomId}, #{payerUid}, #{amountFen}, #{payMethod}, #{status}, #{proofUrl}, #{proofNote}, #{paidAt}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, proposal_id, application_id, room_id, payer_uid, amount_fen, pay_method, status, proof_url, proof_note, paid_at, create_time, update_time FROM brokerage_order WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, proposal_id, application_id, room_id, payer_uid, amount_fen, pay_method, status, proof_url, proof_note, paid_at, create_time, update_time FROM brokerage_order WHERE proposal_id = #{proposalId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, proposal_id, application_id, room_id, payer_uid, amount_fen, pay_method, status, proof_url, proof_note, paid_at, create_time, update_time FROM brokerage_order WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, proposal_id, application_id, room_id, payer_uid, amount_fen, pay_method, status, proof_url, proof_note, paid_at, create_time, update_time FROM brokerage_order WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 'PAID' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE brokerage_order SET pay_method = #{payMethod}, proof_url = #{proofUrl}, proof_note = #{proofNote}, status = 'PROOF_SUBMITTED', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE brokerage_order SET status = 'PAID', paid_at = #{paidAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PROOF_SUBMITTED')

UPDATE brokerage_order SET status = 'PAID', paid_at = #{paidAt},
pay_method = #{payMethod},
update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PROOF_SUBMITTED')
UPDATE brokerage_order SET status = 'CANCELED', pay_method = NULL, proof_url = NULL, proof_note = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PROOF_SUBMITTED')
